metadata.title: Megvax - Manage All Your Ads in One Dashboard
metadata.description: Manage Meta, Google, and TikTok ads in one place. Get more conversions with automatic optimization.

header.notif_budget_80: You have used 80% of your daily budget.

hero.title: All Your Ads,
hero.subtitle: One dashboard for every ad platform. AI finds what works, kills what doesn't.
hero.description: Meta, Google, TikTok — manage every campaign from a single screen. See what's working, fix what's not, and let AI handle the rest.
hero.benefit_2: Works with all major ad platforms

book.title: Book a Demo
book.description: See Megvax in action. Pick a time that works for you and we'll walk you through the platform.
book.name: Full Name
book.notes: What would you like to discuss?
book.notes_placeholder: Tell us about your ad setup, goals, or questions...
book.booking_confirmed_desc: We'll send a confirmation email with the meeting link. See you there.
book.or_signup: Want to get started right away?
book.select_date_first: Pick a date to see available times

how_it_works.title: Three Steps.
how_it_works.subtitle: No complex onboarding. Connect, configure, done.
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Link Meta, Google, TikTok with one click. Secure OAuth — we never touch your credentials.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Define your optimization rules or use our AI presets. Budget caps, bid strategies, creative rotation — you decide.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: AI monitors 24/7, adjusts bids, pauses underperformers, scales winners. You review, it executes.

features.title: Less Tabs, More
features.subtitle: You shouldn't need 6 browser tabs to manage your ads. We built one screen that does it all.
features.f1_desc: Our AI watches your campaigns around the clock. It spots problems before you do and fixes them automatically.
features.f2_desc: Meta, Google, TikTok — all your ad accounts in one place. No more switching between platforms.
features.f3_desc: AI finds your best-performing segments and scales them. Underperformers get paused, not your budget.
features.f4_desc: Set it once: budget caps, bid rules, creative rotation. The system runs it. You approve it.
features.f5_desc: Cross-platform metrics, attribution, custom reports. See exactly where your money goes and what it brings back.
features.f6_desc: Automatic spending limits and anomaly detection. Your budget is protected even when you're not watching.

social_proof.trusted_by: Used by agencies and in-house teams managing real ad budgets
social_proof.t1_quote: We cut our weekly optimization time from 20 hours to 2. The AI suggestions are actually useful — not just noise.
social_proof.t2_quote: ROAS went up 340% in the first month. I was skeptical about AI managing bids, but the results speak for themselves.
social_proof.t3_quote: Clean interface, fast, and the automation rules actually work. First ad tool I've used that doesn't feel like it was built in 2015.

cta.title: Stop Managing Ads Manually.
cta.description: One dashboard. All platforms. AI that actually works. See it for yourself.

about.title: The Future of Ad Management
about.description: Founded in 2024, Megvax set out to make digital marketers' lives easier. Today we power thousands of businesses.
about.value_1_desc: Our customers' success is our success. Every feature is built on this foundation.
about.value_2_desc: Don't waste time on inefficient processes. Get more results with automation.
about.value_3_desc: No hidden costs, no complex terms. Honest and open communication.
about.value_4_desc: Your data is sacred to us. Protected with the highest security standards.
about.careers_description: We're always looking for talented people.

pricing.title: Simple and Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your team. Scale anytime.
pricing.faq_a1: Sign up, connect your ad accounts, and start managing your campaigns in minutes. No complex setup required.
pricing.faq_a2: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan anytime. Changes take effect in the next billing cycle.
pricing.faq_a3: You can pay by credit card, debit card, or bank transfer. Get 2 months free with annual billing.

footer.description: Manage all your ad accounts in one dashboard. Get more conversions with automatic optimization.

homepage.auto_scaling_desc: Successful campaigns are automatically scaled, unsuccessful ones stopped.
homepage.predictive_desc: We provide proactive optimization by predicting future performance.
homepage.real_time_desc: Automation rules that respond within milliseconds.

legal.privacy_collect_content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, company name, and payment information when you create an account or subscribe to our services. We also collect usage data including how you interact with our platform, your ad account performance metrics, and device/browser information.
legal.privacy_use_content: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process transactions, send service-related communications, personalize your experience, and develop new features. Your ad account data is used solely to provide optimization recommendations and analytics within the platform.
legal.privacy_share_content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers who assist in operating our platform (payment processors, hosting providers), when required by law, or with your explicit consent. Your Meta ad account data is never shared with third parties.
legal.privacy_security_content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit and at rest, regular security audits, access controls, and secure data centers. We are committed to protecting your data and promptly addressing any security concerns.
legal.privacy_cookies_content: We use essential cookies for platform functionality, analytics cookies to understand usage patterns, and optional marketing cookies. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through our cookie settings.
legal.privacy_rights_content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can export your data, withdraw consent for optional processing, and request information about how your data is used. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@megvax.com.
legal.privacy_contact_content: For privacy-related inquiries, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@megvax.com. We will respond to all requests within 30 days.
legal.terms_acceptance_content: By accessing or using Megvax, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time, and continued use constitutes acceptance of any changes.
legal.terms_service_content: Megvax provides a Meta advertising management platform that includes campaign management, AI-powered optimization recommendations, analytics, and automation tools. The service is provided 'as is' and we continuously work to improve it.
legal.terms_accounts_content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must provide accurate information and promptly update any changes. You must be at least 18 years old to use our services.
legal.terms_payment_content: Subscription fees are billed in advance on a monthly basis. All fees are non-refundable except as required by law. We may change pricing with 30 days notice. Your subscription will auto-renew unless cancelled before the renewal date.
legal.terms_ip_content: All content, features, and functionality of Megvax are owned by us and protected by intellectual property laws. You retain ownership of your data and content. By using our service, you grant us a limited license to process your data as needed to provide the service.
legal.terms_limitation_content: Megvax shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim. We are not responsible for decisions made based on our AI recommendations.
legal.terms_termination_content: Either party may terminate the agreement at any time. Upon termination, your right to use the service ceases immediately. We will retain your data for 30 days after termination, after which it will be permanently deleted unless required by law.
legal.terms_governing_content: These terms shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Istanbul, Turkey.
legal.cookies_what_content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide a better experience by remembering your preferences, keeping you signed in, and understanding how you use our platform.
legal.cookies_types_content: Essential cookies: Required for the platform to function (authentication, security, preferences). Analytics cookies: Help us understand usage patterns and improve our service (Google Analytics). Marketing cookies: Used to deliver relevant advertisements and measure campaign effectiveness. These are optional and can be disabled.
legal.cookies_manage_content: You can manage cookie preferences through the cookie banner on our site or through your browser settings. Note that disabling essential cookies may affect platform functionality. For more information about specific cookies we use, contact us at privacy@megvax.com.

cookies.title: We use cookies

landing.hero_subtitle: AI manages your Meta ads. Pauses losers, scales winners.
landing.feature_suggestions_desc: AI recommendations you approve in one click. Fast, clear, actionable.
landing.feature_dashboard_desc: All accounts, all campaigns, one screen.
landing.social_proof_subtitle: E-commerce brands and agencies optimize their ad budgets with MegVax.
landing.testimonial_1_quote: Our ROAS increased 40% in 2 months. MegVax auto-paused underperformers and shifted budget to winners.
landing.testimonial_2_quote: As an agency we manage 15 clients from a single panel. Autopilot optimizes even while we sleep.
landing.testimonial_3_quote: We delegated the 4 hours/week we spent on ad optimization to MegVax. Now we focus on strategy.
landing.cta_trust: 14 days free · No credit card required
